markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to align on content strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abnormal Security aims to significantly increase web traffic (2-3x) and inbound leads (10-15x) through improved content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Current bottlenecks include content review processes and design turnaround times](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [GrowthX will focus on optimizing existing content, increasing publishing cadence, and enhancing SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Publishing \~4 blog posts/week, 1 whitepaper/month, 2 webinars/month](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Content ideas sourced from various channels (SEO agency, executives, competitor analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)
  - [Two internal content marketers handle 90% of writing](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2670.0)
  - [Bottlenecks: Jade's review process for major content, slow design turnaround (2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
  - [Limited capacity for systematic content refreshes/updates](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)

### Target Audience and Personas

  - [Primary: CSOs, SOC analysts, IT security managers in medium to large enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Secondary: Business professionals (CEOs, board members) interested in risk mitigation](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Influencers: Industry analysts, journalists, reporters](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

### Product Positioning and Value Props

  - [Three key elements: Risk reduction, cost savings (vs. competitors), productivity increase](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2118.0)
  - [Unique selling points: 3-minute deployment, automated triage, significant SOC time savings (95%)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [Challenge: Some potential users fear job loss due to automation](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Content Optimization Opportunities

  - [Enhance SEO performance of existing content (700+ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Implement systematic content refresh process](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
  - [Improve fact-checking and competitor citation practices](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
  - [Streamline design processes for faster turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3092.0)

### Collaboration Model

  - [GrowthX to supplement and strengthen existing content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing current content and improving organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Potential for cluster content development around pillar pages](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Abnormal Security to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3413.0)
      - [Access to internal metrics/approved stats](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)
      - [Examples of well-reviewed content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3149.0)
      - [CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
      - [Top-performing content examples (white papers, CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3413.0)
      - [Send follow-up requests for necessary access and materials](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3413.0)
      - [Schedule CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
      - [Prepare initial strategy walkthrough for week after next (post-sales kickoff)](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3449.0)
      - [Begin content audit and optimization process](https://fathom.video/share/UfcmcyNT7SMCW4dwHnzxPk3-2EC8KDzD?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
